title: 700 BBY

|events=*The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] established the [[Outer Expansion Zone/Legends|Outer Expansion Zone]]. {{Circa}}<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
*The [[B'omarr Order/Legends|B'omarr Order]] constructed their monastery on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]<ref name="TEA" />

The following events took place in '''700 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] established the [[Outer Expansion Zone/Legends|Outer Expansion Zone]]. {{Circa}}<ref name="TEA" />
*The [[B'omarr Order/Legends|B'omarr Order]] arrived on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="SoT">''[[Secrets of Tatooine]]''</ref> They constructed the monastery<ref name="TEA" /> that would eventually become [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]].<ref name="ROTJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref>
*An [[Alderaan Biotics]] operation was established on [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]].
*[[Minch]] [[Duel on Dagobah (700 BBY)|killed]] the [[Bpfasshi Dark Jedi leader]] in a [[Cave of Evil/Legends|Dark Side Cave]] on [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]].<ref name="hod">{{Tales|16|Heart of Darkness}}</ref>
*The [[Death Seed]] begins to spread through the galaxy<ref name="The Essential Guide to Alien Species">[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]</ref>

==Births==
*[[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla Besadii the Elder]] on [[Nal Hutta/Legends|Nal Hutta]]<ref name="BH">''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]''</ref>

==Deaths==
*[[Unidentified Bpfasshi Dark Jedi|A Bpfasshi Dark Jedi]] on a [[Commerce Guild trading station]]<ref name="hod" />
*The [[Bpfasshi/Legends|Bpfasshi]] [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] leader on Dagobah<ref name="hod" />

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|16|Heart of Darkness}}

==Sources==
